title: C2 process-exclusive canonical geometry authority - PR 1 merge hardening
intent: Operationalize the C2 geometry-origin keystone ruling (PROPOSED / ratification-ready) as additive code: canonical geometry authority is process-derived, not artifact-derived. Canonical body geometry exists only as the output of the approved canonical process following a governed approval event. This PR adds the CanonicalProcessApprovalRecord model, process-policy helper module, additive process-approved canonical-reference factory, process-approved router path, raw-registration guards against fabricated process metadata, and a transition-mode validation WARNING for legacy canonical references that lack process-approval metadata. PR #185 hardening rejects stale client-supplied server-owned approval fields, derives governed approval event ids deterministically from approval content, binds process/authentication metadata into reference hashes, rejects fabricated manual approval records, and records the explicit endpoint debt-ratchet counterpart for the one governed process-approved endpoint.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Adds process-approved canonical geometry authority primitives, validation, router support, tests, taxonomy wording, and ledger safety-net tracking. PR #185 hardening closes stale-field, deterministic-event-id, forged-record, hash-binding, unsupported-authentication, and endpoint-ratchet gaps. The merge resolution moves the PR manifest from the legacy shared .cbsp21/patch_input.json path into a per-PR file under .cbsp21/patches/ so it coexists with #184's manifest-discovery model.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: This is the first code expression of the C2 process-exclusive canonical geometry authority ruling. Existing geometry authority references did not encode human-approved process promotion, and existing validation did not distinguish missing transition metadata from forged or invalid process metadata. The per-PR manifest is required because origin/main retired the shared-manifest workflow for concurrent PRs.

py -3.11 ci/router_count_gate.py -> PASS after justified one-route baseline update; router_files remained 253, route_decorators moved 1223 -> 1224
py -3.11 scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/c2-process-exclusive-canonical-authority-pr1 --head HEAD -> PASS before main merge
py -3.11 scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_gate.py --manifest .cbsp21/patch_input.json --changed-files $(git diff --name-only) -> PASS before main merge
